prompt: Outfit: an oversized black longline hooded sweatshirt in medium-weight cotton-blend fleece, extending to the upper thighs with a broad relaxed body, a wide ribbed hem, and full-length loose sleeves worn completely down, featuring large structural open-shoulder cutouts on both sides that expose the shoulders by design rather than slipped styling, an integrated hood worn down behind the neck, a large white generalized gothic graphic print centered on the chest depicting a skeleton inside an ornate oval frame, approximately four small silver-tone eyelets arranged vertically along one lower front side, and narrow black loop straps fixed near the side seams with hanging silver-tone D-ring hardware as integrated garment details, with no front buttons and no zipper, layered over black ultra-short shorts mostly hidden under the sweatshirt with only a frayed distressed hem visible below, paired with black ribbed mid-calf socks pulled up smoothly and black slouchy leg warmers or boot covers layered over the lower socks and around the shoe collars with heavy natural bunching at the ankles, each detailed with multiple black straps, silver-tone eyelets, and buckles kept fastened, and black leather-like chunky platform lace-up shoes with rounded voluminous toes, visible construction seams, and extremely thick black rubber soles, no bag, no hat, no visible jewelry, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, secure hardware placement, not costume-like, not cheap-looking.
promptEn: Outfit: an oversized black longline hooded sweatshirt in medium-weight cotton-blend fleece, extending to the upper thighs with a broad relaxed body, a wide ribbed hem, and full-length loose sleeves worn completely down, featuring large structural open-shoulder cutouts on both sides that expose the shoulders by design rather than slipped styling, an integrated hood worn down behind the neck, a large white generalized gothic graphic print centered on the chest depicting a skeleton inside an ornate oval frame, approximately four small silver-tone eyelets arranged vertically along one lower front side, and narrow black loop straps fixed near the side seams with hanging silver-tone D-ring hardware as integrated garment details, with no front buttons and no zipper, layered over black ultra-short shorts mostly hidden under the sweatshirt with only a frayed distressed hem visible below, paired with black ribbed mid-calf socks pulled up smoothly and black slouchy leg warmers or boot covers layered over the lower socks and around the shoe collars with heavy natural bunching at the ankles, each detailed with multiple black straps, silver-tone eyelets, and buckles kept fastened, and black leather-like chunky platform lace-up shoes with rounded voluminous toes, visible construction seams, and extremely thick black rubber soles, no bag, no hat, no visible jewelry, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, secure hardware placement, not costume-like, not cheap-looking.
promptZh: 穿搭：一件超大版型的 黑色 长款连帽卫衣，材质为 中等重量棉混纺抓绒，衣长延伸至大腿上部，衣身宽大舒适，配有宽罗纹下摆和全长宽松袖子，袖子自然垂下。设计特点包括两侧巨大的结构化露肩镂空，刻意露出肩膀而非滑落效果；连体兜帽垂在颈后；胸前中心印有巨大的 白色哥特风印花，图案为华丽椭圆边框内的骷髅；下摆一侧垂直排列着四个小型银色金属扣眼；侧缝附近固定有窄黑色环带，并带有悬挂的银色 D 型环作为一体化服装细节；无前襟纽扣和拉链。内搭黑色超短裤，大部分被卫衣遮盖，仅露出边缘磨损的下摆。搭配黑色罗纹中筒袜，袜筒平整拉起，并在袜筒下方和鞋口处叠穿黑色堆堆袜套或靴套，脚踝处有自然的褶皱感，每件单品均带有黑色绑带、银色金属扣眼和扣环。鞋子为黑色仿皮厚底系带鞋，圆润饱满的鞋头，可见的结构缝线，以及极厚的黑色橡胶底。无包袋，无帽子，无可见首饰。高级面料质感，逼真的服装结构，整洁的缝线，自然的接缝张力，可信的面料重量，细微的褶皱，真实的垂坠感，精致的边缘处理，可见的接缝，真实的折痕，做工精良的服装细节，高品质面料触感，细腻的服装真实感，逼真的层次深度，可信的固定张力，自然的布料堆叠，可信的物体接触，稳固的五金件位置，非演出服质感，非廉价外观。
